title: FrostPunk [Ethernal Winter]
description: DataPack that adds eternal winter from FrostPunk, all life freezes before our eyes, huge resource shortages, all mobs die out
body:
# Eternal Winter Add-on Welcome to a world consumed by endless winter! 
This expansion completely changes the climate of the game, turning all biomes into snow-covered plains and icy wastelands.

Survive in extreme conditions: Fight against the frosty wind, freezing ponds and new dangers that appear at night.

New mechanics: added hypothermia effects.

Atmosphere: The snowfall never stops, creating the feeling of a harsh winter apocalypse. Ice caves and ruined buildings complete the gloomy surroundings.
Resources: Trees are frozen and food is becoming scarce, forcing players to rely on cunning and ingenuity to survive.

 Are you ready to challenge the eternal winter?
